name: Butterscotch Brownies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix in the brown sugar until well combined.
3. Cool mixture.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
5. Spread batter into a greased 8x8 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 18 minutes.
7. Cut while still warm.
